title: Buttery Crispy Greek Comte Galette
description: A nostalgic Greek dish featuring Comte cheese, crispy pastry, and a hint of Mediterranean flavor.
instructions: Roll out pie crust dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out a circle of dough using a plate or a cookie cutter.
Place the dough circle in a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a bowl, mix together Comte cheese, Feta cheese, egg, salt, and black pepper.
Add the Comte cheese mixture to the center of the dough circle.
Fold the edges of the dough over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Dot the top of the galette with unsalted butter.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is set.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Sprinkle with parsley and dill before serving.
